question: You remembered your father picking orange blossoms from the front of the Baghdad house and putting them in his cigarette box, and the whole house smelling of orange. Was that a regular habit or one specific season you remember? Did anyone else in the household start doing it? Did anyone notice the cigarettes smelled different when he smoked them?
answer: Yeah, my father used that to hide the And peasant smell from the cigarette, but he was putting it in his box of cigarette outside the house. He was sitting on the single chair and smoking there, but none of us done it. You know that’s different you know and
